name: Employer retaliated with cut hours after claim in Draper, help?

mainEntity.name: Employer retaliated with cut hours after claim in Draper, help?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal; file retaliation with ULC, document everything.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Illegal in Utah; file retaliation complaint with Labor Commission alongside comp.[1] Prove link via timing/docs.[1] Key factors: (1) Document reductions; (2) Light duty separate; (3) Unemployment bridge; (4) Hearing addresses.[1][3] Record all, report formally. Remedies restore and compensate.
